items.title: Iran Warns of Retaliation After US Strikes Darkhovin Nuclear Site
items.desc: Iran's Deputy Foreign Minister Kazem Gharibabadi condemned the US strike on the under-construction Darkhovin nuclear power plant as "a dangerous assault on Iran's peaceful infrastructure" and warned the country will act in response.
